title: satureja cuneifolia subsp. intricata
intro: Satureja cuneifolia subsp. intricata, also known as mountain savory, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of mountain savory include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as supporting respiratory health and digestion. Mountain savory can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and potential interactions with other medications.
